prediction.reasoning: This prediction is generated using a statistical model based on historical stock price movements, specifically a log-normal distribution model that incorporates a historical average daily drift and volatility. For MCD, an approximate annualized drift of 9% and an annualized volatility of 18% were used. The point estimate represents the median expected price, while the confidence intervals reflect the range within which the price is expected to fall with the given probability. It is important to note that this is a statistical projection and not financial advice. Future stock prices are subject to many unpredictable factors, and past performance is not indicative of future results.
